S.FORM: Bujar Nishani u siwkay 9 bulad 29 demiad, Bujar Nishani, u misingkiway. 1966 a mihcan nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Albania ayza sa ci Bujar Nishani, micakat a demiad sa i 2012 a mihcan 7 bulad 24 demiad. u sulit nu zuma a kamu maala ciniza i 2017.7 u tapang nu kanatal, i sinkiw kya tapang nu kanatal, maala 73 paya' i labu' nu 140. u sulit nu Amilika: Bujar Nishani is an Albanian politician who was President of Albaniafrom 24 July 2012 to 24 July 2017. u sulit nu Lipun: . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan: ŚłÉšļěÁąĺ¬∑ś≥ēšľäŚÖč¬∑Śįľś≤ôŚįľ Bujar Nishani „ÉĖ„É§„Éę„ÉĽ„Éē„ā°„ā§„āĮ„ÉĽ„Éč„ā∑„É£„Éč
S.PHON: bujar nisńßani u siwkaj * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, bujar nisńßani, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶an nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu ar~…ĺbania ajza sa ¶i bujar nisńßani, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶an * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu maar~…ĺa ¶iniza i ****.* u tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, i sinkiw kja tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, maar~…ĺa ** paja Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu ***. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika: bujar nisńßani is an ar~…ĺbanian por~…ĺiti ¶ian wńßo was pr…ôsid…ônt of ar~…ĺbaniafrom ** *ur~…ĺj **** to ** *ur~…ĺj ****. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan: *********** bujar nisńßani *************
S.FORM: Bujar Nishani u siwkay 9 bulad 29 demiad, Bujar Nishani, u misingkiway. 1966 a mihcan nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Albania ayza sa ci Bujar Nishani, micakat a demiad sa i 2012 a mihcan 7 bulad 24 demiad. u sulit nu zuma a kamu maala ciniza i 2017.7 u tapang nu kanatal, i sinkiw kya tapang nu kanatal, maala 73 paya' i labu' nu 140. u sulit nu Amilika: Bujar Nishani is an Albanian politician who was President of Albaniafrom 24 July 2012 to 24 July 2017. u sulit nu Lipun: . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan: ŚłÉšļěÁąĺ¬∑ś≥ēšľäŚÖč¬∑Śįľś≤ôŚįľ Bujar Nishani „ÉĖ„É§„Éę„ÉĽ„Éē„ā°„ā§„āĮ„ÉĽ„Éč„ā∑„É£„Éč
S.PHON: bujar nisńßani u siwkaj * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, bujar nisńßani, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶an nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu ar~…ĺbania ajza sa ¶i bujar nisńßani, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶an * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu maar~…ĺa ¶iniza i ****.* u tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, i sinkiw kja tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, maar~…ĺa ** paja Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu ***. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika: bujar nisńßani is an ar~…ĺbanian por~…ĺiti ¶ian wńßo was pr…ôsid…ônt of ar~…ĺbaniafrom ** *ur~…ĺj **** to ** *ur~…ĺj ****. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan: *********** bujar nisńßani *************
